allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', d.get\('Status'\), '| Balance:', d.get\('Balance'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('basePath:', d.get\('basePath'\)\); print\('host:', d.get\('host'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('basePath:', d.get\('basePath'\)\); [print\(p\) for p in list\(d.get\('paths',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]]")
